title: callitriche verna var. fontana
intro: Callitriche verna var. fontana, also known as spring waterwort, is a perennial aquatic plant species that belongs to the family Plantaginaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of spring waterwort include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, callitriche verna var. fontana can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or applied topically as a poultice to alleviate symptoms.
